rationale.compute: Highest failure count (11 rejections, 100% rate). Router's default choice - optimizing this eliminates the dominant failure mode.
rationale.assertion_reasoning_pipeline: Router exhibits poor selection - repeatedly picks compute despite 100% failure. Improving routing prevents failure loops.
rationale.nonlinear_arithmetic: Alternative arithmetic action with 100% failure (3/3). Provides router with working alternative to compute.
rationale.uselemma: Complete failure (2/2) with zero partial verification. Distinct failure mode with high improvement potential.
